cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Andrew could have gone to the clothing store. So first, I need to check all the times he was seen doing different activities and see when he was free. The clothing store is closed after 9pm, so we need to find a time slot before that. Let me list out the times when Andrew was with others: 1. Andrew woke up at 5am. So that's the start of his day. 2. Tiffany saw him taking photos near the Leaning Tower of Pisa from 9am to 11am. So 9 to 11. 5. John saw him waiting at the train station from 11am to 5pm. That's a long time, 11 to 5. 6. Sarah saw him reading at the library from 6pm to 9pm. So 6 to 9 in the evening. Now, the clothing store was closed after 9pm, so the latest he could go is before that. Let's see the timeline: - 5-6am: Tennis - 6-9am: Deli - 9-11am: Photos - 11am-5pm: Train station - 6-9pm: Library So looking at these, there's no time between these activities where he is free.
